regex.source: .setName("Open file on write in a new pane")
regex.target: .setName("在新窗格中打开文件以写入")

regex.source: .setName("Open daily note in a new pane")
.setName("Open file without write in new pane")
regex.target: .setName("在新窗格中打开文件但不写入")
.setName("使用 UID 代替文件路径")
.setName("允许通过 eval 执行任意代码")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose whether to use the vault Name or its internal ID as the identifying parameter.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择使用库名称或其内部ID作为标识参数。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When using UID instead of file paths, you can still add the filepath parameter to know what this URI is about. It's NOT actually used.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当使用 UID 而不是文件路径时，您仍然可以添加 filepath 参数来了解此 URI 的内容。它实际上并不会被使用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("\u26A0\uFE0F This can be dangerous as it allows executing arbitrary code. Only enable this if you trust the source of the URIs you are using and know what you are doing. \u26A0\uFE0F")
regex.target: .setDesc("⚠️ 这可能是危险的，因为它允许执行任意代码。仅在信任您使用的 URI 来源并且知道您在做什么的情况下启用此功能。⚠️")

regex.source: .setDesc("If you like this Plugin, consider donating to support continued development.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果你喜欢这个插件，考虑捐赠以支持持续开发。")

regex.source: .setPlaceholder("Type your data to be written to the file or leave it empty to just open it")
regex.target: .setPlaceholder("输入要写入文件的数据，或留空以直接打开文件")

name:"Copy URI for search and replace"
